falsification_attempts: Empty definitions: MetricDefinition with blank formula/whitespace definition → required_fields_present() False; validate would issue required_fields_blank. Fail to falsify protection.

Missing fields: pre-change MetricDefinition lacked definition/denominator_policy/as_of_policy/source_policy; post-change all 6 metrics populate them non-empty. Fail to falsify completeness of catalog fields.

READY without execution: MetricStatus.READY is only assigned inside _ready(); requires numerator+denominator; code existence of METRIC_DEFINITIONS never stamps READY. String READY_SEMANTICS explicitly forbids 'code existence alone'. Residual: _ready can be unit-called with synthetic nums (by design for tests).

Tests that don't call shipped code: tests import and invoke validate_indicator_catalog, export_indicator_catalog, METRIC_DEFINITIONS, READY_SEMANTICS, _ready, _not_ready — no reimplementation. Fail to falsify.
Empty orphan DoD line 1401: text='' — implementer correctly did not claim flip; left open. Fail to falsify process honesty.
Export missing status on catalog items: status is runtime on MetricResult (proven via _ready/_not_ready tests), not static catalog — acceptable design for 'status de prontidão'.
as_of only report-level: MetricResult has no as_of field; as_of_policy on every definition + CoverageContractReport.as_of. Acceptable for 'data de corte' catalog claim.

Scope 'todo indicador': catalog is authoritative ALL_METRIC_IDS (6) in coverage_contract — not every ad-hoc KPI elsewhere. Bound claim to formal contract indicators (PO intent: metric catalog schema).

issues.description: test_ready_semantics_document_execution_not_code_existence only asserts substrings of READY_SEMANTICS; does not assert that compute_* paths refuse READY when inputs missing (that behavior exists but is covered elsewhere / by design of _not_ready).
issues.recommendation: Optional follow-up: one integration test that a compute_* with empty session returns NOT_READY, not READY.

issues.description: MetricStatus has READY/NOT_READY/PARTIAL/ERROR but not BLOCKED, while BLOCKED_SEMANTICS constant exists. Adjacent DoD item L1403 (`BLOCKED` significa…) is OUT of this 8-item slice.
issues.recommendation: Separate story for BLOCKED enum + semantics enforcement if/when flipping L1403.
